<!-- agent-py-sidecar: auto-generated; do not delete this line to allow refresh -->
# backend/attribution/services.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-13T10:03:09Z

## Purpose
Multi-touch attribution computation · 5 models · T5.9.

Models (all conserve total revenue per customer):

  last_touch    · 100% credit to the FINAL touchpoint before conversion
                  · Used by default in most ad analytics platforms
  first_touch   · 100% credit to the FIRST touchpoint
                  · Useful for brand awareness measurement
  linear        · Equal split across all touchpoints
                  · Default fairness baseline
  time_decay    · More weight to recent touchpoints (half-life=7 days)
                  · Weight = 2^(-days_before_conv / half_life)
  position_based · 40% first · 40% last · 20% split across middle
                  · Aka 'U-shaped' · common in B2B

Touchpoints are synthesized from marketing_campaign_runs:
  customer_id + campaign_id + created_at = touchpoint
  outcome_score = revenue proxy (§57.7 honest · operator wires real $ later)
  Conversion = run with status='converted'

Per §57.7: if customer has no converted run · they contribute 0 (no
fabricated attribution to non-converters).
Per §76 RAI: attribution is segment-aware (cohort_distribution returned).

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import logging
- from `collections` import defaultdict
- from `datetime` import datetime
- from `typing` import Any, Optional
- from `_` import psycopg2
- from `_` import psycopg2.extras
- from `core.config` import get_settings

## Inputs
(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

## Process
### Functions
- `_conn()`: (no docstring)
- `_load_touchpoints(tenant_id, value_per_outcome)`: Build customer journey · returns {customer_id: {touchpoints, converted_at, total_value}}.
- `_attr_last_touch(touchpoints, total_value)`: (no docstring)
- `_attr_first_touch(touchpoints, total_value)`: (no docstring)
- `_attr_linear(touchpoints, total_value)`: (no docstring)
- `_attr_time_decay(touchpoints, total_value, conv_at, half_life_days)`: (no docstring)
- `_attr_position_based(touchpoints, total_value, first_pct, last_pct)`: (no docstring)
- `compute_attribution(model, tenant_id, value_per_outcome)`: Run a single attribution model · returns per-campaign aggregate.
- `compare_models(tenant_id)`: Run all 5 models · return per-campaign per-model matrix for operator
- `list_touchpoints(tenant_id, limit)`: Read-only · raw touchpoint feed for operator inspection.

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above

## Notable inline comments
- ─── Notional value (operator-overridable) ────────────────────
- ─── Load raw touchpoints from marketing_campaign_runs ────────
- Filter to customers with at least one conversion (per §57.7)
- ─── 5 Attribution models ──────────────────────────────────────
- Weight = 2^(-days_before / half_life)
